t_ch: 物料受损是要扣绩效的。
t_en: Damaging materials will be marked down on the performance review.

t_ch: 要不也把我关起来吧！
t_en: How about you lock me up as well!?

t_ch: 关到绩效考核结束就好！
t_en: Just lock me up until the end of the performance review!

t_ch: 怎么回事，又进来了？
t_en: What happened? Why are you here again?

t_ch: 这里个个都是人才。
t_en: Everyone here is so talented.

t_ch: 讲话又好听。
t_en: And such smooth talkers.

t_ch: 我真只是偷个快递而已…
t_en: I'm really just someone who stole a delivery package...

t_ch: 谁知道是药王秘传密信！
t_en: How could I have known that what I stole contained secret letters of the Disciples of Sanctus Medicus?

t_ch: 我可没说里面是什么。
t_en: I never mentioned what was inside.

t_ch: 这证件上的是你么？
t_en: Is that you on the ID?

t_ch: 是我。
t_en: Yes, that's me.

t_ch: 那时候我还很瘦。
t_en: Back then, I was still very skinny.

t_ch: 我说这就不是你。
t_en: I say that this cannot be you.

t_ch: 你还阳假攒了多少天？
t_en: How many days of reanimation leave have you earned?

t_ch: 我记得…怎么清零了？
t_en: I remember that... How come I don't have any left!?

t_ch: 有假不休是会销假的！
t_en: Vacation days that are not taken will expire!

t_ch: 我要求不高。
t_en: I'm not asking for much.

t_ch: 三个饱，两个倒。
t_en: Just three meals provided, proper naps and rest.

t_ch: 一天一顿热水澡。
t_en: And a hot shower every day.

t_ch: 你说的是往生前配置。
t_en: You're asking for the allocations for the living.

t_ch: 「宁失金玉，不进幽狱」…
t_en: "Better to lose your gold and jade than to enter the Shackling Prison."

t_ch: 我这是占全了啊……
t_en: But it seems like I've hit the jackpot...

t_ch: 起码不是犯人身份。
t_en: Well, at least you're not here as a prisoner.

t_ch: 协助破案有奖金么？
t_en: Are there any rewards for helping to solve the case?

t_ch: 真希望平安退休啊。
t_en: I just want a peaceful retirement.

t_ch: 呸呸呸，可别说晦气话…
t_en: Bah! Don't say such depressing things...

t_ch: 干完今天，我就回家结婚。
t_en: After today, I'll go back home and get married.

t_ch: 呸呸呸，比我好不到哪去！
t_en: Hah! How is that any better than me!

t_ch: 身上枝杈横生，毫无美感…
t_en: The branches are growing all over my body once again. What a complete lack of beauty...

t_ch: 又得给它修剪枝条了…
t_en: It's time to trim the branches again...

t_ch: 消灭人类暴政…
t_en: Overthrow the human tyranny...

t_ch: 未来属于智械。
t_en: The future belongs to Intellitrons...

t_ch: 欸？你们因为什么进来的？
t_en: Ah!? Why did you guys get locked in here?

t_ch: 我反对药王秘传。
t_en: Because I'm against the Disciples of Sanctus Medicus.

t_ch: 我支持药王秘传。
t_en: Because I'm a supporter of the Disciples of Sanctus Medicus.

t_ch: 你呢？
t_en: What about you?

t_ch: 呃…我是药王秘传。
t_en: Ugh... I'm a Disciple of Sanctus Medicus.

t_ch: 相声可是冒犯的艺术！
t_en: Crosstalk is the art of offending others!

t_ch: 可你光冒犯了，没见艺术。
t_en: But you're just offending others. There's no art to speak of.

t_ch: 近一点…再近一点。
t_en: Closer... Just a little bit closer.

t_ch: 这的伙食也太好了吧。
t_en: The food here is so good.

t_ch: 我这手里捧着窝窝头。
t_en: As I hold the steamed corn buns in my hand,

t_ch: 口水止不住地往外流。
t_en: I can't stop myself from drooling.

t_ch: 这的伙食也太差了吧。
t_en: The food here is so poor.

t_ch: 要是有一天离开这里。
t_en: One day if I ever get to leave this place,

t_ch: 我会给这里留下差评。
t_en: I'll definitely leave a bad review.

t_ch: 老子大好的男儿。
t_en: I'm a true man.

t_ch: 竟然和你这种人齐名。
t_en: Why am I put on the same level as someone like you?

t_ch: 抢劫效率哪有诈骗高？
t_en: Is robbing ever as efficient as defrauding?

t_ch: 当贼不动脑，终身是小贼。
t_en: A thief who doesn't use their brain will forever remain a petty thief.

t_ch: 我要写一部惊世大作！
t_en: I want to write a masterpiece!

t_ch: 外面的冥差！帮我个忙…
t_en: Spiritfarer! Can you help me?

t_ch: 你能不能教我识字呢？
t_en: Can you teach me how to read and write?

t_ch: 是我的错觉么？
t_en: Was I imagining things?

t_ch: 刚刚熟悉的室友…
t_en: A roommate that I just got to know...

t_ch: 没几天就消失了。
t_en: Vanished into thin air after a few days.

t_ch: 药王慈怀，建木生发。
t_en: Mercy of Sanctus Medicus, the Arbor's new growth.

t_ch: 莳者同心，同登仙道。
t_en: Unity of Discipuli Medici, the Immortality's true path.

t_ch: …等下…
t_en: ...Hold on...

t_ch: 是同登「仙道」还是「极乐」？
t_en: Is it attaining "immortality" or is it "Paramount Bliss"?

t_ch: 坏了，难不成一直背错了？
t_en: Oh no, could it be that I've always been reciting the wrong phrase?

t_ch: 十王敕令。
t_en: The Ten Lords decree.

t_ch: 袭击狱卒者重罚…
t_en: Assaulting prison guards is a serious offense...

t_ch: 再犯者就地正法！
t_en: Repeated offenders will be executed on the spot!

t_ch: 唉，这可不成啊。
t_en: *sigh* This will not do.

t_ch: 没办法，按照流程，入库的物品需要走勘验流程。
t_en: There's no other way. According to the procedure, any suspicious incoming items need to undergo inspection.

t_ch: 目前流程还未走完。
t_en: Currently, the inspection process has not been completed.

t_ch: 麻烦帮帮忙，如果货物不能取回是要扣绩效的。
t_en: Please help me. I'll be marked down on my performance review if I cannot retrieve the goods.

t_ch: 要不这样，不如你把我也关起来吧！
t_en: How about this, why don't you lock me up as well!

t_ch: 什么？
t_en: What?

t_ch: 对，关到绩效结束就好！这样我就不用担责了！
t_en: That's right, just lock me up until the end of the performance review! This way I won't have to bear responsibility!

t_ch: 你是怎么回事？怎么又进来了？
t_en: What happened to you? Why are you here again?

t_ch: 这里个个都是人才，讲话又好听，我才不出去呢。
t_en: Everyone here is so talented and such smooth talkers that there's no way I'll willingly leave this place.

t_ch: 可你已经逼疯十一个室友了！
t_en: You've already driven <unbreak>11</unbreak> roommates insane!

t_ch: 但我上个室友没疯啊。
t_en: But the previous one did not go crazy.

t_ch: 听说你回来他就疯了。
t_en: He became crazy once he heard that you've come back.

t_ch: 这证件上的照片是你么？
t_en: Is that your photo on the ID?

t_ch: 是我。
t_en: Yes, that's me.

t_ch: 那时候我还很瘦。
t_en: Back then, I was still very skinny.

t_ch: 我说这就不是你，通缉令上的倒像你。
t_en: I say that this cannot be you. Rather, you look like the person on the wanted poster.

t_ch: 你们抓错人了，我只是和这人很像。
t_en: You have the wrong person. I just look very similar to this person.

t_ch: 当时卧底时，有幸和她见过。我看你倒是有些相似。
t_en: When I was undercover, I had the fortune of meeting her. I see that you bear some resemblance.

t_ch: 哦？竟会如此相似?
t_en: Oh? Do we truly look that alike?

t_ch: 此时此刻恰如彼时彼刻。
t_en: Doesn't this feel eerily familiar?

t_ch: 最近加班有点太多，过几天必须还阳一趟。
t_en: I've been working too much overtime lately. I must go back to the world of the living soon.

t_ch: 你还阳假攒了多少天？
t_en: How many days of reanimation leave have you earned?

t_ch: 没记错的话应该有五年了吧…
t_en: If I remember correctly, I should still have five years...

t_ch: 你是完全没休过吧，快查一下剩余假期！
t_en: You've never taken any vacation? Quick, go and check the days of vacation you have remaining!

t_ch: 这么紧张干嘛…咦？
t_en: Why are you so nervous... Hmm!?

t_ch: 年假不按时休，可是会销假的。
t_en: If you don't take your vacation days regularly, they'll expire.

t_ch: 什么？！没了，全没了！
t_en: What!? It's gone! All gone!

t_ch: 五年，五年了，你知道这五年我是怎么过的吗？
t_en: Five years... It's five years! Do you know how I lived in the past five years?

t_ch: 全拿来上班了。
t_en: I spent all my time working.

t_ch: 长官，你能不能先告诉我，幽囚狱的待遇怎么样？
t_en: Sir, can you tell me what the treatment in the Shackling Prison is like?

t_ch: 你问这个干嘛？
t_en: Why are you asking this?

t_ch: 我要求不高：三个饱，两个倒。一天一顿热水澡。
t_en: I'm not asking for much: Just three meals provided, proper naps and rest, and one hot shower every day.

t_ch: 你吃饭是不是还有什么忌口？
t_en: Then do you have anything that you don't eat?

t_ch: 没错，我有四不吃……
t_en: That's right, there's four things that I abstain from...

t_ch: 你爱吃不吃。
t_en: It's up to you whether you want to eat.

t_ch: 都说「宁失金玉，不进幽狱」，我这是占全了啊……
t_en: People say that it's "better to lose gold and jade than to enter the Shackling Prison," but it seems like I've hit the jackpot...

t_ch: 你先往好处想，起码你不是犯人身份。
t_en: On the bright side, at least you're not here as a prisoner.

t_ch: 在押犯人起码不担心住宿和吃饭问题，可我担心。
t_en: Unlike me, prisoners don't have to worry about food and accommodation.

t_ch: 乐观点，这桩案子很棘手，地衡司才移交给我们的。
t_en: Look on the bright side. The Realm-Keeping Commission only handed this case to us because it is very difficult.

t_ch: 那有什么乐观的？
t_en: What's the bright side?

t_ch: 你要想啊，难的案子功劳才大嘛。难度越大，报酬越贵。
t_en: Just think about it. It's the hard cases where they give the most credit. The higher the difficulty, the better the reward.

t_ch: 协助破案会有奖励么？有多少？
t_en: There's a reward for helping to solve the case? How much?

t_ch: 被关押的日子太久了，始终得有些爱好来打发时间。
t_en: After being locked up for so long, I needed a hobby to help me pass time.

t_ch: 之所以选择园艺盆栽，是因为其类山水，有种以景抒怀的感觉，能让我想到在狱外的时光。
t_en: I chose to grow potted plants because they allow me to express myself, reminding me of my time outside of the prison.

t_ch: 万幸这里既不缺盆栽素材，也不缺时间和耐心，非要说的话，还是缺一样——
t_en: Thankfully, there isn't a lack of gardening materials here. I also have the time and patience. So honestly, the only thing missing is—

t_ch: 这囚室缺面镜子！我就算修剪了枝条，也看不到盆景上身的整体效果，哎，真是可惜。
t_en: That this cell lacks a mirror! Even if I trim the branches, I cannot see the full glory of the bonsai tree. *sigh* It's such a shame.

t_ch: 消消消消消消灭人类暴政…
t_en: O—Overthrow the human tyranny...

t_ch: 未来属于于于于智械。
t_en: The future belongs to I—Intellitrons...

t_ch: 新的帝帝帝帝帝皇即将诞生…
t_en: The new e—emperor is about to be born...

t_ch: …将对有有有有机生命展开开开净化。
t_en: ...Prepare t—to eliminate all o—organic lifeforms.

t_ch: 锟斤拷烫烫烫……
t_en: Jistgabburashothothot...

t_ch: 您不认识我啊？
t_en: Do you not recognize me?

t_ch: 我认识你干嘛。
t_en: Why should I recognize you?

t_ch: 我可是一位大艺术家。
t_en: I'm a famous performer.

t_ch: 就你还大艺术家，那大艺术家怎么进这来？
t_en: A famous performer? Then what's a famous performer doing in here?

t_ch: 那些人他们不懂幽默！我不就说了几个段子么？
t_en: Those people don't know humor! All I did was tell a few jokes!

t_ch: 说几个段子就进来了？
t_en: You came in because you told a few jokes?

t_ch: 是啊，这相声可是冒犯的艺术，理不歪，笑不来。
t_en: That's right. Crosstalk is the art of offending others! It wouldn't be funny if it makes too much sense.

t_ch: 你这是光冒犯没见艺术啊。
t_en: But you're just simply offending others. There's no art to speak of.

t_ch: 你不懂，这叫台下互动。
t_en: You don't understand. This is called crowd work.

t_ch: 你的互动指的是随机找被害者讲段子，再把那些不给你捧哏的人打一顿？
t_en: Your idea of interaction is to make a joke out of someone, and beat them up if they don't play along with you?

t_ch: 这就叫冒犯的艺术。
t_en: That's why it's the art of offending others.

t_ch: 早安。
t_en: Good morning.

t_ch: 来诃教授，我是负责查案的诗琳，我能向你请教吗？
t_en: Professor Laihe, I'm Shilin, the one who is in charge of this case. Can I ask you a few questions?

t_ch: 你是寒鸦判官的人，是吗？
t_en: You're working for Judge Hanya?

t_ch: 是的。
t_en: Yes.

t_ch: 可否看看你的证件？
t_en: Can I see your ID?

t_ch: 当然可以。
t_en: Of course.

t_ch: 近一点…再近一点。劳烦你。
t_en: Closer... Just a little bit closer. Thank you.

t_ch: 近一点。
t_en: Closer.

t_ch: 寒鸦判官派个实习武弁来见我？
t_en: Judge Hanya sent a warden trainee to look for me?

t_ch: 我是来向你学习的，也许你有能帮到我的地方。
t_en: I'm here to learn from you. Perhaps there's something you can help me with.

t_ch: 你很不老实呢，幽府武弁诗琳。
t_en: You're not being honest at all, Wraith Warden Shilin.

t_ch: 江湖上人们都说仙舟大盗「北阿峰，南阿蓉」，没想到你就是阿蓉。
t_en: People speak of the legendary bandits of Xianzhou, "Feng of the North and Rong of the South." I didn't expect to meet Rong here.

t_ch: 那都是江湖上的「浮名」，今年是你我，明年就是阿珍阿强了。
t_en: That's misguided fame. It might be you and me today, but nobody knows who it'll be next year.

t_ch: 我抢劫仙舟上下各大银铺，神策府出动彦卿骁卫才将我逮捕，你又有什么本事？
t_en: I robbed all the major silver stores on Xianzhou, and the Seat of Divine Foresight even had to send Lieutenant Yanqing to capture me. What are you capable of?

t_ch: 我跟你不一样，我是搞诈骗的。
t_en: Unlike you, I scam others.

t_ch: 我阿峰大好的男儿，竟然和你这种人齐名。简直是天大的耻辱。
t_en: I, Feng, am a true man! Why am I put on the same level as someone like you? It's the greatest insult.

t_ch: 你抢劫哪有我诈骗效率高？你说说，你抢了那么多银铺，抢了多少？
t_en: Is robbing ever as efficient as defrauding? Tell me, just how much have you gotten from robbing so many silver stores?

t_ch: *狠狠地用手比了一个数字*
t_en: *Fiercely indicates a number by gesture*

t_ch: 这才多少，不到我的百分之一…哎，当贼不动脑，终身是小贼。
t_en: So little? That's less than one percent of what I've gotten... *sigh* A thief who doesn't use their brain will forever remain a petty thief.

t_ch: …我要怎么才能做到像你那样呢？
t_en: ...What do I have to do to become someone like you?

t_ch: 你看，这幽囚狱就是一方宝地，咱们犯罪界多少大圣先贤就是在监狱里开悟的。
t_en: Look, the Shackling Prison is a treasure trove. Do you know how many criminal elites and bigwigs obtained enlightenment in this prison?

t_ch: 谢谢你，大师，我悟了！
t_en: Thank you, master! I understand now!

t_ch: 「药王慈怀，建木生发。莳者同心，同登极乐。」
t_en: "Mercy of Sanctus Medicus, the Arbor's new growth. Unity of Discipuli Medici, the Enlightenment's true path."

t_ch: 「说是语时，莳者九万九千九百九十九人俱，皆断生老病苦。」
t_en: "As they spoke the words, the <unbreak>99,999</unbreak> disciples were liberated from youth, old age, sickness, and suffering."

t_ch: 「药王慈怀，建木生发。莳者同心，同登仙道。」
t_en: "Mercy of Sanctus Medicus, the Arbor's new growth. Unity of Discipuli Medici, the Immortality's true path..."

t_ch: 「说是语时……」
t_en: "As they spoke the words..."

t_ch: 等下，是「同登仙道」么…我怎么记得是「同登极乐」？
t_en: Hold on! Is it "the Immortality's true path"? Why do I remember it being "the Enlightenment's true path"?

t_ch: 坏了，是不是这几十年一直背错了？
t_en: Oh no, could it be that I've recited the wrong phrase for several decades?

t_ch: 自从听说彦卿宝宝这次守擂，我可是花了大价钱买了前排。
t_en: I spent lots of money to buy a front-row seat after I heard little Yanqing is defending his title.

t_ch: 你…叫他宝宝？他看着比你还高。
t_en: You're calling him... "little"? He looks taller than you.

t_ch: 我可比他大七十岁，叫宝宝没毛病。
t_en: Hey, I'm <unbreak>70</unbreak> years older than him. I can totally call him "little."

t_ch: 不是很懂你们追星的人。
t_en: I don't get your fandom at all.

t_ch: 你说得对，罗浮杂俎账号名为「云璃一生应援」的先生。
t_en: Whatever you say, He-Whose-Ghostly Grove-Account-Is-Named-"YunliFanForLife."
Shh!

t_ch: 罗浮室外温度这么暖和！这得是有多大的暖炉啊！
t_en: The outdoor temperature is so warm in the Luofu! You must have a huuuuge heater!

t_ch: 在我们这只有丹炉没有暖炉。我们有中央控温系统调节温度。
t_en: We don't have heaters here, only elixir crucibles... We have a centralized temperature control system that adjusts the outdoor temperature.

t_ch: 那不就是大暖炉么，也是消耗地髓来供暖吧？
t_en: Isn't that just a huge heater anyways? Does that also burn Geomarrow to provide heat?

t_ch: 呃…不不，是汲取拖拽行星的地心热量…
t_en: Um... No. It extracts the heat from the core of the planet the ship is dragging...

t_ch: 你看，还是用地髓的暖炉！
t_en: See! That's still a heater that uses Geomarrow!

t_ch: 唔…坏了，这下更解释不清了。
t_en: Um... bother. Now it's even harder to explain the difference.

t_ch: 罗浮武术有个很有趣的点，不少招式都是用动物命名。比如琼鸟剑法，形虎拳之类的…那么有观摩智械运行而领悟的招式么？
t_en: There's something interesting about Luofu martial arts in that many moves are named after animals, such as Mignon Starling Swordplay and Tiger Fists... Are there moves that take inspiration after Intellitrons?

t_ch: 这可真没听说过…总觉得像「谛听形意拳」，「机巧鸟剑法」这样的名字听着好奇怪。
t_en: Never heard of that... Names like Diting Imitation Fist and Cycrane Swordplay would sound very odd.

t_ch: 这也能理解，观摩动物得出的武术比较着眼于动物的捕猎天性，发力也在有机生物的关节活动范畴内。
t_en: However, that is understandable. Martial arts that derive from the activity of animals focus on the animalistic hunting instinct, and their movements are limited to the physical exertion that the joints of organic beings are capable of.

t_ch: 但仙舟智械大多是工造产物，天性与功能都是被固定设计出来的，智械关节更不是所有生物能模仿的。
t_en: Unfortunately, most of the Xianzhou Intellitrons are artifex creations. Their nature and functions are all designed to a set template, and the joints of Intellitron are not something all organics can imitate.

t_ch: 那确实可以理解。
t_en: That is indeed understandable.

t_ch: 不过，传说联盟曾出现过有着生物大脑、内脏，却有机械躯体的「偃偶统帅」，上臂可分开成两对，操控四柄热能剑作战。
t_en: But legends say that the Alliance once had a "Puppet Marshal" with organic brain and organs, as well as a mechanical body. Its upper limbs could be split into two pairs, and it fought while wielding four thermal blades.

t_ch: 它所使招数也超出寻常人关节的运动范畴，也没人类能学得来。就在它要危害四方时，却被「无罅飞光」刺中了维生装置。
t_en: The moves it had were also beyond the limits of human joints, and no human could learn such movements. However, as it was about to lay waste to the land, the Transcendent Flash ran her sword through its life-support device.

t_ch: 这说明了什么？半人半机械，纯度太低了。
t_en: And how would you interpret that? I think it's because it was a half-man half-machine, so its purity was too low.

t_ch: 纯度，有用吗？
t_en: Purity? Can you eat that?

t_ch: 你说智械能修炼所谓的内功吗？
t_en: Do you think Intellitron can also practice that so-called inner cultivation?

t_ch: 内功啊…我觉得这估计很难。
t_en: Inner cultivation... I think that'll be really difficult.

t_ch: 哦？为什么？
t_en: Oh? Why?

t_ch: 那些话本里说，练内功得有经脉和丹腑。你们智械有经脉么？
t_en: Those story books all say inner cultivation requires meridian circuits and a Core Esse. Do you Intellitrons have meridian circuits in you?

t_ch: 哦，这确实没有。那皮皮西人能练内功么？
t_en: Oh. True. We don't. Then, can the Pepeshi practice inner cultivation?

t_ch: 当然可以，我们皮皮西人虽小，但是五脏俱全。
t_en: Of course! Us Pepeshi may be little, but we have all the internal organs one needs!

t_ch: …都不知道你这话我该怎么接了。
t_en: ...Is that really something one can boast about?

t_ch: 我刚报了那个剑术速成班！那位老师说我底子不错，一学期就可以出师了，下届演武仪典进十六强问题不大。
t_en: I just signed up for that swordplay crash course! That master said I have great aptitude and can graduate after one semester, and should have no problem being in the top <unbreak>16</unbreak> in the next Wardance ceremony.

t_ch: 那还不错啊，她可是很少夸人。
t_en: That's good to hear. That particular master rarely praises people.

t_ch: 那下届演武仪典什么时候啊。
t_en: Then when is the next Wardance?

t_ch: 我也不知道，只记得上届在几百年前。
t_en: I don't know. The last one was a few centuries ago, though.

t_ch: 啊？我也活不到那会儿啊！
t_en: What? There's no way I can live that long!

t_ch: 没事，可以先学，反正是速成班，一学期很快的。
t_en: It's fine. You can just learn the swordplay first. It's a crash course anyway, and the semester will be gone before you realize it.

t_ch: 倒也是…糟了，这个速成班一学期是十八年。
t_en: That's true... Wait. No. Each semester in this course is eighteen years long.

t_ch: 才十八年，能学会吗？那也太速成了。
t_en: You can graduate in just eighteen years? That's definitely some crash course.

t_ch: 你们对「速成」两字有误解！
t_en: You people don't understand what "crash" means at all!

t_ch: 如果在仪典上拔得头筹！就能出人头地了！
t_en: If I prevail at the Wardance, I'll be able to make a name for myself!

t_ch: 什么叫「拔得头筹」。
t_en: What does "prevail" mean?

t_ch: 就是获得第一啊。这你都不知道什么意思？
t_en: It means to win. To be number one. You don't even know what means?

t_ch: 你预选赛过了吗？
t_en: Did you pass the prelims?

t_ch: 没有！
t_en: No!

t_ch: 那你应该明白我是什么意思。
t_en: Then you should know what I meant.

t_ch: 我不明白，你必须当着我的面讲清楚！
t_en: I don't! You have to explain it to my face!

t_ch: 这竞锋舰，感觉没有「晖长石号」好看。
t_en: This Skysplitter doesn't look nearly as good as the Radiant Feldspar.

t_ch: 你要是喜欢「晖长石号」，你回去啊。
t_en: If you like the Radiant Feldspar, then just go back to that ship.

t_ch: 怎么了嘛，不喜欢还不让我说了吗？
t_en: Hey, c'mon, I have a right to say that I don't like something.

t_ch: 咱们才刚登船，你就开始抱怨了，跟你出门旅游真累。
t_en: We've just boarded and you're already complaining. It's so exhausting to travel with you.

t_ch: 两位选手势均力敌，看得我手心都冒汗了。
t_en: The opponents are neck-to-neck! My palms are getting sweaty watching them.

t_ch: 我已经有好几百年没有这种燃起来了的感觉了。
t_en: I haven't felt so heated up for centuries!

t_ch: 怎么？你也想上台比划两下子？
t_en: Oh? You wanna go up to the stage to try your martial moves too?

t_ch: 唉...这一世是没戏了，希望蜕生后成变成武胎剑骨吧。
t_en: *sigh*... It's not gonna happen in this lifetime. Hopefully I can become more martial after my hatching rebirth.

t_ch: 你做梦呢，你看这里哪个选手不是勤学苦练出来的。
t_en: Keep dreaming. All the contestants have worked hard and shed blood and sweat to get here.

t_ch: 我看小说里有「一朝悟透，胜过百年修行」的说法。
t_en: I've read novels where they say, "having a eureka moment is better than a hundred years of hard training."

t_ch: 这一世我先悟，下一世我定能成。
t_en: I'll get my eureka moment in this life, then I'll definitely make it in my next life.

t_ch: 你说你这和「今天仰卧，明天起坐」有什么差别呢？
t_en: Isn't that the same as the people saying "I'll eat more today and exercise tomorrow"?

t_ch: 老婆，我就说来罗浮度蜜月没错吧，居然赶上了演武仪典，哈哈哈！
t_en: I told you it'd be a great decision to spend our honeymoon at the Luofu, sweetie. We even caught the Wardance ceremony, hahaha!

t_ch: 你就是想看比武才带我来罗浮的吧？这打打杀杀的到底有什么好看，真后悔没去方壶泡温泉。
t_en: You're just here in the Luofu because you want to see the ceremony, right? I don't think this violent fighting is fun at all. How I wish we're at the Fanghu and soaking in the hot springs...

t_ch: 温泉随时都可以泡，这么刺激的比赛错过了就没有了啊！
t_en: You can go visit the hot springs any time, but missing such an exciting martial competition means you'll miss it forever!

t_ch: 要看你自己看，我要去金人巷逛街了。
t_en: Well, enjoy yourself with the martial competition, then. I'm gonna go shopping at Aurum Alley.

t_ch: 不爱看就别看，看你的……
t_en: Don't watch if you don't like it then! You uncultured...

t_ch: 臭男人，你刚才说的是什么？
t_en: What did you say, honey?

t_ch: 我说我永远永远永远爱你，我亲爱的老婆！
t_en: I—I said I love you forever and ever and ever, my dearest wife!

t_ch: 看你们这狼狈的样子，不会也是被门口的黄牛带进来的吧？
t_en: Were you two brought here by the scalper at the front door too?

t_ch: 别说了，确实是他把我们弄进来的，结果还是得补票。
t_en: Tell me about it. He got us in, but we have to pay and make up for the ticket again.

t_ch: 他刚开始跟我们说有内部关系，我们看他一脸自信的样子，就付了钱。
t_en: Initially, he said that he knows someone inside. Seeing how confident he was, we decided to pay him.

t_ch: 没想到准备检票的时候，他一把抱住检票员，让我们拼命往里冲。
t_en: But when it came time to get our tickets checked, he suddenly held down the gate staff and told us to run inside as fast as we can.

t_ch: 我鞋都跑掉了一只，但里面全是工作人员，我被尴尬到了。
t_en: I even lost a shoe running in! But there are staff members everywhere in the venue. It was so awkward.

t_ch: 你们还算好，他带我弯弯绕绕找到一处矮墙，费了吃奶的劲才翻进来，脚都扭了......
t_en: You still had it good. My scalper took me along several nooks and crannies before finding a low wall. It took me so much effort to scale it and get in, and I even twisted my ankle...

t_ch: 所以你逃票成功了？
t_en: So, did you successfully skip on the ticket?

t_ch: 翻进来的时候直接坐在云骑军身上了，我这不是也来补票了嘛。
t_en: I landed on a Cloud Knight when I jumped down the wall... So, here I am, making up for the tickets...

t_ch: 别理我，让我一个人静静。
t_en: Leave me alone. I want some personal time.

t_ch: 输就输了呗，有啥大不了的。
t_en: It's just a loss. It's not the end of the world.

t_ch: 我苦练了四百年啊！
t_en: But I trained hard for <unbreak>400</unbreak> years!

t_ch: 竟然被一个总角之年的小孩打败了！
t_en: Only to be beaten by a literal child!

t_ch: 剑术只有高低之分，修行时间并不能决定一切。
t_en: The only thing that matters in swordplay is skill. The time spent training doesn't mean much at the end.

t_ch: 练拳健身来了解一下么？
t_en: Interested in martial arts for fitness?

t_ch: 这么神奇？那练你们这个拳能长高么？
t_en: Really? Can I grow taller by practicing your martial arts?

t_ch: 呃…减肥可以，这个不行。
t_en: Um... It can help you lose weight, but probably not make you grow taller.

t_ch: 那能让我像幻戏里那样飞檐走壁如履平地么？
t_en: Then, can it make me walk on the wall like what they show in immersias?

t_ch: 呃…这个也不行。
t_en: Um... No can do.

t_ch: 那能隔空点穴把人定住么？
t_en: Then, what about stunning people in space by telekinetically jabbing their meridian points?

t_ch: 这个更不行啊！
t_en: That would be impossible!

t_ch: 那叫什么仙舟武术啊？！
t_en: Then how dare you call what you practice a Xianzhou martial arts!?

t_ch: 来试试演武好运抽抽乐嘛？全都是演武仪典周边官方正版！
t_en: Come join the lucky Wardance raffle! All prizes are official Wardance merchandise!

t_ch: 除了特等奖，其他都是滞销货啊。真是正版么？怎么颜色这么糙？
t_en: They're all unpopular items except the special prize... Are they really official goods? Why are the colors so rough?

t_ch: 呃…要不要看看我们特等奖：限定战损版无罅飞光，错过可就再也没有了！
t_en: Um... Would you like to take a look at our special prize, the limited Transcendent Flash Wounded version? If you miss it, you won't find this bargain elsewhere!

t_ch: 这明明都是老模具，重涂换色就当限定了？还有这个战损…
t_en: It's just an old model that you've repainted, and you're masquerading it as a limited item? And this "wounded version"...

t_ch: 呐这个战损就有说道了，这个是「活擒呼雷」套装里拆出来的。你看这个战损多还原？
t_en: Hey, there's a story behind this wounded version. It was taken out of the "Hoolay's Capture" set. Just look at how realistic it is!

t_ch: 怎么看都是你自己做旧的吧？
t_en: It's just sloppily painted, no matter how I look at it!

t_ch: 演武仪典不算什么。想老夫二十岁那年参加过剑首大会。
t_en: The Wardance ceremony is nothing. Truth be told, I once participated in the Sword Champion Summit when I was twenty years old.

t_ch: 对手是个白发女子，老夫一时轻敌被她一剑重伤。自此闭关调养直到上个礼拜才好。
t_en: My opponent was a white-haired woman. I let down my guard and she heavily wounded me with one stab. I have been recuperating ever since and only fully recovered as of last week.

t_ch: 那您高寿。
t_en: May I ask how old you are, sir?

t_ch: 老夫七百有六。
t_en: I am <unbreak>706</unbreak> years old.

t_ch: 那…她下手是忒重了点。
t_en: I see... She definitely went a little bit too hard.

t_ch: 欢迎您抵达竞锋舰，请配合进行安检流程。
t_en: Welcome aboard the Skysplitter. Please cooperate with the security inspection process.

t_ch: 请您有序排队，等待安检。
t_en: Please line up and wait for security inspection.

t_ch: 请将所有随身物品放入安检托盘。
t_en: Please place all your personal belongings onto the security tray.

t_ch: 请确保身上无金属物品，通过安检门。
t_en: Please ensure that you're not carrying any metallic objects, then pass through the security gate.

t_ch: 如有警报，请停留等待二次检查。
t_en: If there's an alarm, please stay behind for a second inspection.

t_ch: 请出示您的登舰凭证与观礼票据。
t_en: Please show your boarding pass and event ticket.

t_ch: 检测中…确定为联盟贵宾身份。
t_en: Checking... Identity confirmed as a VIP of the Alliance.

t_ch: 谢谢您的配合。祝您观礼愉快。
t_en: Thank you for your cooperation. We wish you an enjoyable time at the ceremony.

t_ch: 感觉被针对了呢…
t_en: Why do I feel targeted...?

t_ch: 喂，你说功夫加唱歌跳舞有没有搞头？
t_en: Hey, you reckon we can get popular if we combine martial arts with singing and dancing?

t_ch: 没搞头。
t_en: Nah.

t_ch: 啧啧，你怎么年纪轻轻就一把年纪了，思想太保守了。现在观众想看的都是跨界。
t_en: Oh, come on. You're so young, but your heart is already so old! That's conservative thinking. What the audience wants now is cross-disciplinary performances.

t_ch: 你看，现在都是拍幻戏的唱歌，唱歌的说相声，说相声的变戏法，变戏法的当艺人。
t_en: See, now it's all about immersia actors singing, singers doing crosstalk, crosstalk artists doing magic tricks, and those trained in magic tricks going into acting.

t_ch: 这不乱套了么？
t_en: Isn't that just a hot mess?

t_ch: 现在讲究的就是多开花，你拦不住群众爱看什么。
t_en: It's all about being versatile these days. You can't stop the audience from voting with their wallet.

t_ch: 你可别瞎代表群众了。
t_en: Please stop misrepresenting the audience.

t_ch: 听说彦卿宝宝这次守擂。
t_en: Little Yanqing is defending his title.

t_ch: 你…叫他宝宝？
t_en: You're calling him... "little"?

t_ch: 我比他大七十岁，没毛病。
t_en: I'm <unbreak>70</unbreak> years older than him.

t_ch: 罗浮室外温度这么暖和！
t_en: The Luofu outdoors is so warm!

t_ch: 这得是有多大的暖炉啊！
t_en: You must have a huuuuge heater!

t_ch: 罗浮是用中央控温系统。
t_en: We have centralized temperature control.

t_ch: 那不就是暖炉么？
t_en: Isn't that just a heater?

t_ch: 倒也没差…
t_en: True...

t_ch: 我报名了演武仪典。
t_en: I signed up for Wardance.

t_ch: 亲爱的，我一定拔得头筹。
t_en: My darling, I shall prevail.

t_ch: 我若胜了，一定娶你。
t_en: And I'll marry you when I win.

t_ch: 这样啊，我也决定了…
t_en: Well, I have decided too...

t_ch: 一定让你输得体无完肤。
t_en: That I'll thoroughly defeat you.

t_ch: 咱俩打了两百多回。
t_en: We exchanged <unbreak>200</unbreak> blows.

t_ch: 你没赢过我啊！
t_en: And you didn't win!

t_ch: 你也没赢过我！
t_en: You didn't win either!

t_ch: 咱俩一个师傅教的。
t_en: We share a master!

t_ch: 破不了招啊！
t_en: We don't know how to defeat the other!

t_ch: 好姐姐，那艘星槎好漂亮。
t_en: Big sis, that starskiff is so pretty.

t_ch: 姐给你买艘新款的！
t_en: I'll buy you a brand-new one!

t_ch: 好姐姐，那竞锋舰好大啊。
t_en: Big sis, that Skysplitter is so big.

t_ch: 姐给你买艘更大的！
t_en: I'll buy you a bigger one!

t_ch: 姐，你就是我唯一的姐！
t_en: Ohhh, you're the best ever!

t_ch: 不少武术是用动物命名…
t_en: Many martial arts are named after animals...

t_ch: 比如琼鸟剑法，形虎拳。
t_en: Such as Mignon Starling Swordplay and Tiger Fists.

t_ch: 有看智械领悟的武功么？
t_en: Are there any inspired by Intellitrons?

t_ch: 「谛听形意拳」…
t_en: Diting Imitation Fist...

t_ch: 「机巧鸟剑法」…
t_en: Cycrane Swordplay...

t_ch: 听着好怪。
t_en: Sounds so odd.

t_ch: 你说智械能修炼内功吗？
t_en: Can Intellitrons practice inner cultivation?

t_ch: 练内功得有经脉。
t_en: You need meridian circuits for that.

t_ch: 哦，那智械确实没有经脉。
t_en: Oh. True. We don't have those.

t_ch: 这罗浮菜也太辣了！
t_en: Luofu dishes are too spicy!

t_ch: 我的嘴像要被烧伤了！
t_en: My mouth feels like it was burnt!

t_ch: 这算联盟最寡淡的菜系。
t_en: They have the blandest dishes in the Alliance.

t_ch: 这在曜青只能算微微辣。
t_en: This is considered only slightly spicy on the Yaoqing.

t_ch: 我要回方壶…我胃疼。
t_en: I wanna go back to the Fanghu... My stomach hurts.

t_ch: 我刚报了个剑术速成班！
t_en: I signed up for a swordplay crash course!

t_ch: 没注意一学期是十八年…
t_en: Didn't realize one semester is <unbreak>18</unbreak> years though...

t_ch: 那还真是速成。
t_en: That's definitely a crash course.

t_ch: 你们对「速成」两字有误解！
t_en: You people don't understand what "crash" means at all!

t_ch: 如果在仪典上拔得头筹！
t_en: If I prevail at the Wardance!

t_ch: 就能出人头地了！
t_en: I'll be able to make a name for myself!

t_ch: 预选赛都没过的人…
t_en: You didn't even pass the prelims...

t_ch: 就不要考虑头筹的事了。
t_en: So stop thinking about winning.

t_ch: 感觉不如「晖长石号」。
t_en: Feels worse than the Radiant Feldspar.

t_ch: 跟你出门旅游真累…
t_en: It's so exhausting to travel with you.

t_ch: 本来想趁着职务之便。
t_en: I wanted to take advantage of my post.

t_ch: 结果一场比赛都没看着。
t_en: But I didn't see a single competition.

t_ch: 场外粉丝冲突倒是不少。
t_en: Just plenty of fans fighting outside.

t_ch: 擂台上的比赛真精彩啊。
t_en: The matches in the ring are so exciting.

t_ch: 看的我都燃起来了。
t_en: I'm all fired up.

t_ch: 你也想上台比划两下？
t_en: You wanna have a go up there?

t_ch: 等我蜕生成武学奇才吧。
t_en: After I'm reborn into a martial genius, sure.

t_ch: 我腿都站麻了。
t_en: My leg is going numb.

t_ch: 兄弟再坚持一会。
t_en: Hang in there, brother.

t_ch: 站完岗比赛都结束啦！
t_en: The match will end when our shift ends!

t_ch: 我也好想看比赛啊......
t_en: I wanna see the matches too...

t_ch: 打打杀杀有什么好看。
t_en: What's so interesting about violence...

t_ch: 不爱看，就别看。
t_en: Don't watch if you don't like it.

t_ch: 你刚才说的是什么？
t_en: What did you say?

t_ch: 我说我永远爱你，老婆。
t_en: I said I love you, dearest wife!

t_ch: 你俩也是遇上了黄牛？
t_en: You two met some scalpers too?

t_ch: 别说了，刚补完票。
t_en: I just made up for my ticket money.

t_ch: 怎么说，你也是？
t_en: You met scalpers as well?

t_ch: 进场的办法有点离谱。
t_en: You'll never guess how I got in.

t_ch: 「摘星社」特别活动。
t_en: Star-Picking Tours event.

t_ch: 豪华观赛包厢。
t_en: Luxurious boxes to watch the matches in.

t_ch: 名厨定制餐饮。
t_en: Customized catering from famous chefs.

t_ch: 与选手零距离。
t_en: Up-close experience with competitors.

t_ch: 选择摘星，观赛舒心。
t_en: Star-Picking Tours is all you need.

t_ch: 这票买亏了。
t_en: The ticket isn't worth it.

t_ch: 三回合就结束了。
t_en: The match ended in three moves.

t_ch: 我上我也行。
t_en: At this rate, I can go compete too.

t_ch: 毕竟三比零。
t_en: It's three-to-zero after all.

t_ch: 求求你了，让我静一静。
t_en: Please, leave me alone.

t_ch: 有什么，不就打输了么？
t_en: Come on, it's just a loss.

t_ch: 可我苦练了四百年啊。
t_en: But I trained for <unbreak>400</unbreak> years.

t_ch: 对手是总角之年的小孩！
t_en: And lost to a literal child!

t_ch: 形虎拳法，健身防身。
t_en: Tiger Fists for fitness!

t_ch: 那…能长高么？
t_en: Can I grow taller with it?

t_ch: 这个不能。
t_en: Unfortunately no.

t_ch: 那能让我飞檐走壁么？
t_en: Can I walk on walls with it?

t_ch: 也不行…
t_en: Not that either...

t_ch: 演武仪典周边贩售！
t_en: Wardance merch sales!

t_ch: 历代剑首可动手办！
t_en: Action Figure of past Sword Champions!

t_ch: 还有限定战损版涂装！
t_en: Limited-edition "Wounded" versions!

t_ch: 我二十岁时被剑首打败。
t_en: The Sword Champion beat me when I was <unbreak>20</unbreak>.

t_ch: 一时疏忽被她一剑重伤。
t_en: Wounded me heavily with one move.

t_ch: 直到上个礼拜才好。
t_en: I only recovered last week.

t_ch: 那您高寿?
t_en: How old are you, sir?

t_ch: 老夫七百有六。
t_en: I am <unbreak>706</unbreak> years old.

t_ch: 小道消息，比赛有内幕。
t_en: Gossip here! The results are rigged!

t_ch: 真的假的啊？还能这样？
t_en: Really???

t_ch: 那你看，主办里咱有人。
t_en: Look, I know someone in the organizing committee.

t_ch: 嚯？想不到你对武术有了解。
t_en: Oh? Didn't think you'd know about martial arts.

t_ch: 那我倒要考考你了。
t_en: Now I want to test you.

t_ch: 我现在不太想和你说话。
t_en: I don't want to talk to you right now.

t_ch: 欢迎您抵达竞锋舰。
t_en: Welcome aboard the Skysplitter.

t_ch: 在俯瞰幽囚狱之前，需要提醒你——恐高症，又称畏高症。基本症状表现为眩晕、恶心、食欲不振，并使身体失去平衡。换句话说，站在这里的人会变得非常危险。
t_en: Before you look down at the Shackling Prison, I have to remind you of acrophobia, which is otherwise known as the fear of heights. The basic symptoms include vertigo, nausea, loss of appetite, and loss of balance. In other words, it can be very dangerous for the person standing here.

t_ch: 无论是长翅膀的，还是带螺旋桨的，无论是高空爱好者，还是恐高的人…再提醒你一次，你应该保护好自己的生命，请尽量避开这种危险的地方。
t_en: Whether you have wings or propellers, and no matter how much you love heights or fear them... I have to remind you once again to treasure your life and avoid such dangerous places.

t_ch: 恐高提示已经足够多了，请问你是否还要向深处俯瞰呢？
t_en: I've warned you enough about the height. Do you still want to look down into the depths?

t_ch: 我要立刻凝视深渊！
t_en: I want to immediately stare into the abyss!

t_ch: 别忘了，深渊也在凝视你。
t_en: Alright, don't forget that the abyss stares back at you.

t_ch: 能再给我一句鼓励的话吗？
t_en: Can you give me some words of encouragement?

t_ch: 当然可以，不过我有一个要求，你需要自己大喊出来，为自己壮壮胆！
t_en: Of course I can. But I also request that you shout it out to encourage yourself!

t_ch: 消除恐惧最好的办法是面对它。
t_en: The best way to overcome your fears is to face them.

t_ch: 坚持才能胜利，加油！
t_en: The only way to succeed is to persevere! You can do it!

t_ch: 我相信我能飞，还能触摸天空。
t_en: I believe I can fly, I believe I can touch the sky.

t_ch: 你可以如此相信，但是我仍然建议你双脚不要离地。
t_en: You can choose to believe so, but I suggest that you to keep your feet rooted to the ground.

t_ch: *比较刺耳的通用粗口*
t_en: *Crude common vulgarities*

t_ch: 很好！大声痛骂一通，你感觉到自己热血沸腾。
t_en: Excellent! After venting your frustrations, you start to feel the adrenaline rushing through your veins.

t_ch: 那么你现在准备好了吗？
t_en: So, are you ready now?

t_ch: 我要立刻凝视深渊！
t_en: I want to immediately stare into the abyss!

t_ch: 别忘了，深渊也在凝视你。
t_en: Alright, don't forget that the abyss stares back at you.

t_ch: 我已经做足了准备，撤退！
t_en: I'm already prepared... to retreat!

t_ch: 你做出当下最合适的决定。当然，你可以随时回来。
t_en: You made the best decision for the moment. But of course, you can come back at any time.

t_ch: 就此离开，没有人会受伤。
t_en: Leave now, and no one will get hurt.

t_ch: 你做出当下最合适的决定。当然，你可以随时回来。
t_en: You made the best decision for the moment. But of course, you can come back at any time.

t_ch: 希望你能站稳一点。
t_en: I hope that you steady yourself.

t_ch: 发出「Woooh～」声音。
t_en: Shout "Woooh."

t_ch: 「Woooh～」你仿佛听到了深处的回声。
t_en: "Woooh~" You seem to hear the echo from the depths.

t_ch: 「Woooh～」
t_en: "Woooh~"

t_ch: 「Woooh～」你和幽囚狱深处不断一呼一应。
t_en: "Woooh~" You constantly hear the echoes from the depths of the Shackling Prison.

t_ch: 就到此为止吧，这里的囚犯都知道你是幽囚狱的好邻居了。
t_en: That's enough... All the prisoners here now know what a good neighbor of the Shackling Prison you are.

t_ch: 「我是世界之王！」
t_en: "I'm the king of the world!"

t_ch: 有机会的话，还是找艘游轮再说这句话吧。
t_en: If you get the chance, perhaps you should repeat this on a cruise ship.

t_ch: 差不多了，就到这吧。
t_en: Alright, that's enough for me.

t_ch: 差不多了，我该回去了。
t_en: Alright, I should head back.

t_ch: 你反复确认，自己绝对没来过这里，可周身的环境总给你一种回家的感觉。
t_en: You repeatedly confirm that you've definitely never been here before, but your surroundings make you feel as if you've returned home.

t_ch: 你蓦然回首，仿佛见到一位威武的将军与他年轻的骁卫，将军要求骁卫好好记住阶下囚犯的样貌，往日的回声从记忆中缓缓浮现……
t_en: Looking back, you seem to see a mighty general with his young lieutenant. The general instructs his lieutenant to clearly remember the faces of the prisoners here. Echoes of the past slowly emerge from memory...

t_ch: 「人有五名，代价有三……」
t_en: "Of five people, three must pay a price..."

t_ch: 威罚罪囚，靖平域内。见此门者，当…
t_en: Punish the criminals and pacify the territory. One who sees this door...

t_ch: …自省身前。不赦十恶，罪责种种，难逃法眼。
t_en: ...reflects upon their past. The Ten Unpardonable Sins are burdened with guilt and cannot escape from the judgment of omniscia.

t_ch: 干我们这行，要么两只眼都闭上，要么两只眼都睁开，因为…
t_en: In our line of work, we either judge everything fairly or we do not judge at all. Because...

t_ch: …这里是幽囚狱，容不得睁一只眼闭一只眼。
t_en: ...this is the Shackling Prison. There's no turning a blind eye to things.

t_ch: 此处为鳞渊境幽囚狱的入口，同样也是出口…
t_en: This place is the entrance of Scalegorge Waterscape's Shackling Prison. But at the same time, it is also the exit...

t_ch: …这意味着有人会从这里入狱，也会有人从这里出狱。
t_en: ...This means the people here are either entering the prison or leaving the prison.

t_ch: 左眼会用来记住那些身陷囹圄的犯人…
t_en: The left eye is used to remember the prisoners cast into this prison...

t_ch: …右眼会用来忘记那些刑满释放的凡人。
t_en: ...while the right eye is used to forget the mortals who have completed their sentences.

t_ch: 我们一侧的脸会「只说真话」…
t_en: One side of our face only tells the truth...

t_ch: …另一侧的脸会「只说假话」。
t_en: ... and the other side only tells lies.

t_ch: 猜猜看吧…
t_en: Make a guess...

t_ch: …算了，你早就知道我没有这个设定了。
t_en: ...Forget it, you already know that this is not true.

t_ch: 慧骃执辔，造作兵祸，践踏生灵，以铁蹄缚锁，长夜障目。
t_en: Rider of the Houyhnhnm who incited riots and trampled upon living creatures. To be restrained by horseshoes and permanently blindfolded.

t_ch: 重犯造父的囚室，曾横冲直撞的奔马，如今却安静得宛如一潭死水。
t_en: The cell of the criminal, Zaofu. Once a rampaging stallion, now as still as stagnant water.

t_ch: 恶侯无生，啜食人血，残杀胞族，令苦饿饥寒，没入永昼。
t_en: Evil existence of the void who drank human blood and committed phratry murder. To be subjected to suffering from hunger and cold for eternity.

t_ch: 重犯无生侯的囚室，复仇与愤怒的呓语穿过长梦，渗透进现实。
t_en: The cell of the criminal, Void Existence. The sleep talking full of vengeance and anger seeped into reality through the long dreams.

t_ch: 步离巢父，行则战至，祸乱诸界，判绝足禁闭，不得受生。
t_en: The Borisin Brood Lord, with him came war and a scourge upon all worlds. His sentence is to be eternally detained and imprisoned, never to be reborn.

t_ch: 重犯呼雷的囚室，哪怕是石头的孔洞和缝隙里，也残存着难以消除的血腥味。
t_en: The cell of the criminal, Hoolay. From the cracks and holes in the stones, a lingering stench of blood remains, its presence nigh impossible to remove.

t_ch: 化外歌民，贪图不死，窃取机要，施真空浮牢，五感尽夺。
t_en: A balladian who sought immortality and stole important secrets. To be confined to a vacuum-sealed floating prison and robbed of their senses.

t_ch: 重犯瞽目王酋的囚室，由于完全真空化的处理，就连最微小的振动也感受不到。
t_en: The cell of the criminal, Blind Chieftain. Due to being subjected to a complete vacuum, not even the smallest of vibration can be felt.

t_ch: 是空空如也的房间，还是罪无可恕的囚犯？你无从知晓。故事，嘶吼，石门隔绝了一切，只留下冰冷的沉默。
t_en: Is it an empty room, or does it house an unpardonable prisoner? There's no way for you to find out as the stone door isolates it from everything, leaving only a cold silence behind.

t_ch: 但即便石门也无法掩盖另一侧漾动的水声...仿佛某位控驭水体的神明曾被镇压在此。
t_en: But even a door of stone cannot conceal the sound of water sloshing on the other side... It is as if a god that reigned over water is sealed here.

t_ch: 据说守在门口的石狮子往往雌雄成对——雌狮脚下是幼狮，雄狮脚下是绣球。可这里的石狮子脚下全都是绣球。恐怕是地衡司开需求单时填错了吧。
t_en: It's said that the pair of stone lions guarding the entrance are often of opposite genders. The female lion has a cub at her feet, while the male lion has an embroidered ball at his feet. Yet, all the stone lions here have an embroidered ball at their feet. It could be that the Realm-Keeping Commission had made a mistake in filling out the request form.

t_ch: 在仙舟联盟，任何看似不起眼的东西，都可能蕴含银河中最顶尖的科技，这尊石狮子也不例外。它的武功比你更高，但绝不会轻易出手。
t_en: Anything that looks insignificant in the Xianzhou Alliance may be the product of the most advanced technology in the cosmos — this stone lion is one of them. It is a better martial artist than you, but it won't touch you without a valid reason.

t_ch: 你摸了摸它爪中的绣球，它瞪了你一眼。你可能会以为这是错觉，但这不是。
t_en: You touch the embroidered ball under its paws, and it shoots you a glare. You might think you're imagining things, but you aren't.

t_ch: 每一尊石狮子都有不同的性格：有些敦厚老实、有些暴躁易怒、有些爱开玩笑。不过，你很难了解它们的性格——毕竟它们都很酷，不爱聊天。
t_en: Every stone lion has a different personality — some are good-natured, some are irritable, and some have a good sense of humor. Yet, it's hard to get to know them well, considering they are aloof and hate small talk.

t_ch: 请配合进行安检流程。
t_en: Please cooperate with security inspection.

t_ch: 请确保身上无金属物品。
t_en: Ensure you're not carrying any metal.

t_ch: 感觉被针对了呢…
t_en: Why do I feel targeted...?

t_ch: 功夫加唱跳有没有搞头？
t_en: What about martial arts with singing and dancing?

t_ch: 没搞头。
t_en: Nah.

t_ch: 年纪轻轻就一把年纪了。
t_en: You're so young, but your heart's so old!

t_ch: 这广告歌都已经几百年了。
t_en: The jingle for this ad is a few centuries old.

t_ch: 版权早进入公共领域了吧？
t_en: Its rights should be in the public domain already.

t_ch: 我查了，作曲是个仙舟人。
t_en: Well, the composer is a Xianzhou native...

t_ch: 换言之，他还活着呢……
t_en: In other words, he's still alive...

t_ch: 请讲讲你的武术哲学！
t_en: Please tell me about your martial philosophy!

t_ch: 像水一样，我的朋友！
t_en: My friend, it's to be like water!

t_ch: 具体来说是什么意思？
t_en: What do you mean?

t_ch: 亦舒亦急，可湍可缓。
t_en: It can be swift or slow, rapid or meandering.

t_ch: 听不懂但我大受震撼！
t_en: I don't get it, but it sounds impressive!

t_ch: 难道幽囚狱里面也能收快递？你不禁对鹤运物流的业务之广感到惊诧。要是住在这里，有快递，通网络，每天什么也不用做，幽囚狱还能被称为监狱吗？
t_en: Is it even possible to receive deliveries inside the Shackling Prison? You can't help but marvel at the wide delivery network of the Heron Express. If there are courier deliveries and internet in the Shackling Prison, and prisoners don't have to do anything every day, is the Shackling Prison really a prison?

t_ch: 快递包装采用了鹤运物流最先进的防腐保鲜技术，确保刑期五百年以内的客户刑满释放时，仍然可以感受到跨越时间的售后服务。
t_en: To preserve and maintain the freshness of its contents, the delivery packaging utilizes the cutting-edge technology of the Heron Express. This ensures that customers set to be released within the next <unbreak>500</unbreak> years can still experience the after-sales service that transcends time.

t_ch: 在囚犯出狱以前，他们的快递都只能老老实实地待在这里。但是，他们在牢里到底是怎么下单的？
t_en: Until the prisoners are released, their packages will be left here. But how exactly do they place their orders from inside the prison?

t_ch: 你曾经在太卜司见过这些玉兆单元，但是没有见过这种*锁链形态*…呃，在仙舟，犯了错的玉兆也会被锁在幽囚狱里吗？
t_en: You've seen Jade Abacus Units at the Divination Commission, but not these chain-shaped ones... Um, in Xianzhou, are jade abaci that have made mistakes also incarcerated in the Shackling Prison?

t_ch: 犯罪嫌疑玉兆：天穹系列玉兆单元。重大罪行：算错了。
t_en: Suspect Abacus: Sky Dome Series Jade Abacus Unit. Major Crime: Wrong calculation.

t_ch: 鉴于你已经在仙舟上见过能飞的剑、写诗的伞和作祟的火，对于坐牢的玉也已经见怪不怪了…谁知道它会不会突然长出两条腿跑掉？
t_en: Given that you've already seen flying swords, an umbrella that writes poetry, and flames that cause mischief, seeing a piece of jade put in jail doesn't surprise you anymore... Who knows whether it'll grow a pair of legs and escape one day.

t_ch: 你注意到鳞渊境的幽囚狱整体潜伏在古海之下，是不断向下延展的柱状结构。冥差们在这块屏幕前管理着不同囚室、不同囚犯的实时信息。
t_en: You notice the Scalegorge Waterscape's Shackling Prison is fully submerged under the ancient sea, as a column structure that extends endlessly into the depths. Spiritfarers monitor and manage real-time information of prison cells and prisoners on this screen.

t_ch: 从犯人的心跳频率到囚室内的空气密度，系统对古海底部的管控细致入微。重刑犯的拘束容不得一点偏差，任何错漏，都将酿成一场无妄之灾。
t_en: From the heartbeats of the prisoners to the density of air within the cells, the system's control over the bottom of the ancient sea is meticulous down to the finest detail. There cannot be the slightest mishap with regard to the captivity of criminals who have committed serious offenses, for the slightest error could result in an unforeseen calamity.

t_ch: 你注意到屏幕上的内容几乎是毫无变动，对狱卒们来说，毫无变动就是最好的。
t_en: You notice that the display on the screen almost never changes. For the prison guards, no change is probably the best-case scenario.

t_ch: 兼备照明功能的玉兆单元，能够将运算中产生的废热转化为光能向外释放。你似乎理解了，无论是什么样的世界，人们总喜欢在这种科技产品上看到RGB的灯光。
t_en: A Jade Abacus Unit that also has built-in lighting. It can convert the waste heat generated during calculation into light energy and release it. You seem to come to the understanding that no matter what world it is, people love to see RGB lighting on tech products.

t_ch: 瞧这漂亮的琥珀色光泽，眼前的玉兆单元没准儿是克里珀的粉丝。可照这么说，绿色的玉兆岂不都是药师的粉丝？你顿悟了扣帽子的精髓。
t_en: Judging from the amber luster, this Jade Abacus Unit might be a fan of Qlipoth. Does this mean that a green jade abacus is a fan of Yaoshi? You have suddenly learned the art of putting labels on others.

t_ch: 承担大规模运算的中枢性玉兆单元，高密度的特殊晶体材质…既然不在太卜司，而是在幽囚狱上班，超强的运算性能多半是被浪费了吧……
t_en: A core Jade Abacus Unit made from a special high-density crystal that is used to perform large-scale calculations... Utilizing it in the Shackling Prison rather than the Divination Commission is probably a waste of its powerful calculation capabilities...

t_ch: 饱经风霜的石门，自幽囚狱建成之刻便屹立于此。波月古海之下，所有的秘密它都了如指掌，可石头不会说话，只能把它们都烂在肚子里。
t_en: A weathered stone door that has stood here since the construction of the Shackling Prison. It knows all the secrets under the Lunarescent Depths, but regardless, nobody else will find out, for stone cannot speak.

t_ch: 根据司狱所说，曾有无数犯人尝试逃狱来到石门前想要通过这里离开幽囚狱——然而事实上，「石门」只是徒有其表，这门后没有通路，只有坚硬的海底岩石……
t_en: According to the Jailer, countless criminals have come to the stone door and attempted to escape the Shackling Prison through it. However, this stone door is merely a facade. The door leads to nowhere but hard rocks at the bottom of the sea...

t_ch: 在全幽囚狱戏份最多的片场之一，石门非常荣幸地错过了所有的出镜机会，所以，它打算用静坐表示自己的抗议，虽然并没人在意。
t_en: One of the sets in the Shackling Prison where much of the drama occurs. The stone door is very privileged to have missed all the chances to appear thus far. Therefore, it has decided to sit in silent protest, although no one will notice.

t_ch: 左目洞观过去，罪业查察。右眼凝视现在，赏善罚恶。
t_en: The left eye uncovers the past and investigates sin. The right eye gazes into the present, rewarding good and punishing evil.

t_ch: 镇守牢狱的青铜兽面怒目圆睁，俯视押送至此的罪囚。时常会有罪犯在这里吓破了胆，只能被冥差抬进幽囚狱。
t_en: The bronze beast that guards the Shackling Prison looks down in rage at the prisoners that have been escorted here. Occasionally, prisoners will be scared witless here and have to be carried into the Shackling Prison by the spiritfarers.

t_ch: 「幽狱大门到底有没有防夹感应呢？」这是你此刻最想知道的问题。
t_en: "Does the Shackling Prison gate have anti-pinch protection after all?" This is the question you most want to know right now.

t_ch: 很遗憾，没有。你从令人眩晕的夹缝中逃得一命，获得了有一个有用的冷知识。
t_en: Unfortunately, no. You narrowly escaped from the dizzying gap, gaining an unexpectedly useful piece of trivia.

t_ch: 幽狱大门没有防夹感应。但即使这样，也阻止不了你在夹缝中寻求乐趣的闲情雅致。
t_en: The Shackling Prison's gate lacks anti-pinch sensors. Nevertheless, this doesn't stop you from seeking leisurely elegance in the gap for fun.

t_ch: 空中监察系统已经上线，已检测到访客信息，{NICKNAME}，登录…登录成功。已确认访客并非十王司系统职员，本次调查将屏蔽掉部分囚犯信息。
t_en: Aerial surveillance system online, visitor information confirmed. {NICKNAME}, logging in... Log-in successful. Visitor is confirmed to not be a member of the Ten-Lords Commission. A portion of prisoner information will be blocked during this investigation.

t_ch: 为了改善调查体验，机巧鸟内置了不同的调查模式，调查内容也会产生对应的区别。常规调查模式正在维护中，暂时无法使用。
t_en: In order to enhance your investigation experience, the cycrane has various investigation modes installed. The details of your investigation will be affected depending on the mode you select. Normal investigation mode is under maintenance and currently unavailable.

t_ch: 请选择「当前可选的调查模式」确认囚室信息。
t_en: Please select from the "currently available investigation modes" to confirm cell information.

t_en: Even the coldest of hearts would be thawed by the warmth of this convict's enthusiastic mentality.

t_ch: 《持续跳舞的人和悬浮的物体》
t_en: The Ever-Dancing Man and Floating Objects

t_ch: 让所有的舞步都在内部以美好的形式共存
t_en: May all of our dancing steps be united in the form of inner beauty.

t_ch: 我是～怪异的山水画！
t_en: I am~ A haunted landscape painting!

t_ch: 悬浮的画卷里传来阵阵嬉笑，在云烟缭绕的山间，墨客们吟诵出诗谣。
t_en: Bursts of laughter come from the floating scroll as clouds roll over the mountains within, and scholars recite poems.

t_ch: 《关于仙舟传统文人山水画在银河当代艺术语境下的处境》
t_en: Xianzhou Traditional Landscape Painting Through the View of Cosmic Contemporary Art

t_ch: 作者对仙舟传统纸本水墨材料与技法的深耕，使其艺术作品在保留了传统审美的前提下展现出独属于此刻的视觉感受和当代纬度
t_en: The author's in-depth study of Xianzhou traditional ink, paper materials, and techniques allows this piece to maintain traditional aesthetics, while displaying a unique visual perspective and also the scope of contemporary work.

t_ch: 材质：纸本水墨，不明液体
t_en: Materials: Ink and paper, unknown liquid
